title: Built-in Tools
description: Native tools and capabilities the agent ships with out of the box

features.title: File read
features.description: Read file contents from the local filesystem

features.title: Notebook editing
features.description: Read and edit Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) cells

features.title: Shell execution
features.description: Execute shell commands in the user's environment

features.title: Background monitor
features.description: Run a process in the background and react to its output (tail logs, poll status)

features.title: Scheduled tasks
features.description: Schedule recurring or one-shot prompts within a session (cron-like)

features.title: Code search
features.description: Search file contents by pattern, regex, or filename glob

features.title: Semantic search
features.description: Search codebase by meaning using embeddings or indexing, not just exact matches

features.title: Web fetch
features.description: Fetch and read the contents of a URL

features.title: LSP integration
features.description: Language server features: go-to-definition, find references, type errors, symbol search

features.title: Browser control
features.description: Programmatic browser interaction: take screenshots, navigate pages, click elements

features.title: Image input
features.description: Read and understand images and screenshots (multimodal input)

features.title: Subagent spawning
features.description: Spawn sub-agents with their own context window to handle tasks in parallel

features.title: Task management
features.description: Track work progress with task lists and checklists within a session
